prompt_en: Say: This appeal is a crucial legal resource for challenging the administrative decision.
expected_es: Este recurso es una herramienta legal crucial para impugnar la decisión administrativa.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here to classify or identify what 'el recurso' is.

prompt_en: Say: My cousin is an insurance adjuster, so he understands the report on the technical fault very well.
expected_es: Mi primo es perito de seguros, así que entiende muy bien el informe sobre la avería técnica.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate a profession or role. Note the omission of the indefinite article before professions.

prompt_en: Say: This type of encryption is from a high-security protocol developed for financial transactions.
expected_es: Este tipo de cifrado es de un protocolo de alta seguridad desarrollado para transacciones financieras.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER + 'de' is used to express origin or source.

prompt_en: Say: The sandpaper is made of silicon carbide, which is ideal for sanding hard surfaces during the renovation.
expected_es: El papel de lija es de carburo de silicio, ideal para lijar superficies duras durante la reforma.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER + 'de' is used to indicate the material something is made of.

prompt_en: Say: The frustration is understandable given the unexpected delay in the implementation of the new system.
expected_es: La frustración es comprensible dado el retraso inesperado en la implementación del nuevo sistema.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe inherent or fundamental characteristics, such as how 'frustration' is perceived.

prompt_en: Say: The premiere of the documentary about the financial crisis is next Friday at the cultural center.
expected_es: El estreno del documental sobre la crisis financiera es el próximo viernes en el centro cultural.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate the time or date of an event.

prompt_en: Say: The value for money is truly exceptional for this new induction hob.
expected_es: La relación calidad-precio es verdaderamente excepcional para esta nueva placa de inducción.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe inherent qualities or to make a value judgment.

prompt_en: Say: Risk prevention is a mandatory requirement for all employees in this company.
expected_es: La prevención de riesgos es un requerimiento obligatorio para todos los empleados de esta empresa.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to classify or identify the subject, describing what it is inherently.

prompt_en: Say: My retirement is in two years, and I'm already planning my trip.
expected_es: Mi jubilación es dentro de dos años, y ya estoy planificando mi viaje.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate the time or date of an event, even if it's in the future.

prompt_en: Say: The social unrest is a direct consequence of inadequate public policies.
expected_es: El malestar social es una consecuencia directa de políticas públicas inadecuadas.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe an inherent characteristic or a relationship of cause and effect.
